\---

name: Bug Report

about: Create a report to help us improve the OS

title: "\[BUG] "

labels: bug

assignees: ''



\---



\## Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.



\## Steps to Reproduce

Steps to reproduce the behavior:

1\. Go to '...'

2\. Click on '...'

3\. Scroll down to '...'

4\. See error



\## Expected Behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.



\## Actual Behavior

What actually happens instead.



\## Screenshots/Logs

If applicable, add screenshots or error logs to help explain your problem.



```

Paste logs here

```



\## System Information

\*\*OS Version:\*\* \[e.g. v0.8.1]

\*\*Build:\*\* \[e.g. Build rc1]

\*\*MCU:\*\* \[e.g. Raspberry Pi Pico W]

\*\*Manufacturer:\*\* \[e.g. Raspberry Pi]

\*\*RAM:\*\* \[e.g. 264k]

\*\*Flash:\*\* \[e.g. 2 MB]

\*\*Shell Version:\*\* \[e.g. v1.0.0]



\## Reproducibility

\- \[ ] Reproducible on clean install

\- \[ ] Reproducible after update

\- \[ ] Occurs intermittently

\- \[ ] Occurs consistently



\## Related Issues

Closes #(issue number, if applicable)

Related to #(issue number, if applicable)



\## Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here.



\---



\*\*Note:\*\* Please ensure you're running the latest version before submitting a bug report. Check our \[changelog](CHANGELOG.md) and \[known issues](KNOWN\_ISSUES.md) first.
